name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
🗒️ StandupBot runs your team's async daily standups.

Tap /start to open the menu, then:
• 👥 Team — create a team or join one with a code
• ✍️ My Update — post today's standup (yesterday / today / blockers)
• 📊 Today's Digest — see everyone's update in one place
• 🔔 Nudge — remind teammates who haven't posted yet
• 🗂 History — browse and search past standups

Everything is reachable by tapping — you don't need to remember any commands.

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
